channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [HINDHARD] Hindustan Hardy Ltd to Approve Financial Statements and Consider Dividend for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Hindustan Hardy Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 06/05/2026 to consider and approve the audited financial statements for the year ended 31.03.2026, audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31.03.2026, and declare dividends, if any, for the financial year ended 31.03.2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will be closed from April 1, 2026, to Monday, 11* May, 2026.

  • Hindustan Hardy Ltd to consider and approve audited financial statements for the year ended 31.03.2026
  • The company will approve audited financial results for the quarter and year ended 31.03.2026
  • Dividend declaration for the financial year ending 31.03.2026 is under consideration
  • Trading window for dealing in the company's securities will be closed from April 1, 2026, to Monday, 11* May, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Hindustan Hardy Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [KTKBANK] Karnataka Bank Appoints New Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
item.description:
Karnataka Bank Ltd. has announced the appointment of Mr. Sham K as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer with effect from February 27, 2023. The bank also confirmed that M/s. Integrated Registry Management Services Private Limited is their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent. This disclosure is in accordance with the continuous disclosure norms of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Karnataka Bank appoints Mr. Sham K as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
  • The appointment is effective from February 27, 2023
  • M/s. Integrated Registry Management Services Private Limited is the bank's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KARNATAKA BANK LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PNCINFRA] PNC Infratech Settles with Suspended Director, Receives Rs. 20.0 Crore Compensation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

PNC Infratech Ltd has entered into an amicable settlement with Mr Nakul Bharana, erstwhile/suspended Director of the Corporate Debtor. The Company has received an amount of Rs. 20.0 Crore (Rupees Twenty Crores only) in form of Demand Draft(s) drawn in Company's favour. This settlement is a result of the protracted proceedings related to the Resolution Plan submitted by the Company and approved by the CoC, which was not approved by the Hon'ble NCLT due to applications and counter applications by other stakeholders.

  • PNC Infratech has entered into an amicable settlement with Mr Nakul Bharana
  • The Company has received a compensation of Rs. 20.0 Crore
  • The settlement is a result of protracted proceedings related to the Resolution Plan
  • The Resolution Plan was not approved by the Hon'ble NCLT due to applications and counter applications by other stakeholders
  • The Company has issued a NOC (No Objection Certificate) to Mr Nakul Bharana

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNC Infratech Ltd | Category: Settlement

item.title: [GENNEX] Gennex Laboratories to Consider Regularization of Additional Director and Appointment of Scrutinizer
item.description:
Gennex Laboratories Ltd has informed the BSE that the Board of Directors will meet on April 16, 2026, to consider several matters. The key agenda items include deciding on the regularization of Additional Director Ms. Khushbu Kachhawa as a Director (Non-Executive Independent Woman Director) and considering the appointment of a Scrutinizer for the Extraordinary General Meeting, if the date is finalized. The meeting will take place at the Company's Corporate Office in Hyderabad, Telangana.

  • Gennex Laboratories to decide on regularization of Additional Director
  • Consideration of appointing a Scrutinizer for the Extraordinary General Meeting
  • Meeting to be held at the Company's Corporate Office in Hyderabad, Telangana

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GENNEX LABORATORIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDBNK] Ind Bank Housing Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results on April 13, 2026
item.description:
Ind Bank Housing Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 13, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the year ended on March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at Indian Bank, Corporate office, Chennai. In accordance with the SEBI (Prevention of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s code of conduct for prevention of Insider Trading, the Trading Window for dealing in the Company’s securities will be closed from April 1, 2026, and will open 48 hours after the financial results are declared to the Stock Exchange.

  • Ind Bank Housing Ltd to consider and approve Audited Financial Results for the year ended on March 31, 2026.
  • Board Meeting scheduled on April 13, 2026.
  • Trading Window for dealing in the Company’s securities to be closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Trading Window to open 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND BANK HOUSING LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SSL] Share Samadhan Ltd Announces Resignation of Secretarial Auditor M/s Manoj Verma & Associates
item.description:
Share Samadhan Ltd has announced the resignation of its Secretarial Auditor, M/s Manoj Verma & Associates, with immediate effect as of 8th April 2026. The resignation is due to the firm's preoccupation and other professional commitments. This information is provided in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The required details are attached as Annexure-A.

  • Share Samadhan Ltd announces the resignation of its Secretarial Auditor, M/s Manoj Verma & Associates.
  • The resignation is due to the firm's preoccupation and other professional commitments.
  • The resignation is effective immediately as of 8th April 2026.
  • This announcement is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The required details are attached as Annexure-A.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Share Samadhan Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [VARROC] Varroc Engineering Appoints Avijit Roy as Group CHRO
item.description:
Varroc Engineering Limited, a leading global tier-1 automotive supplier, has announced the appointment of Avijit Roy as Group Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO) effective 10th April 2026. Avijit will lead Varroc’s group human resources strategy, focusing on strengthening organizational capability, enabling a high-performance culture, and accelerating talent transformation in the mobility ecosystem. He succeeds Kavita Kulkarni, who played a pivotal role in shaping Varroc’s people strategy over the past seven years.

  • Avijit Roy appointed as Group CHRO at Varroc Engineering Limited.
  • He will spearhead Varroc’s group human resources strategy, focusing on strengthening organizational capability and enabling a high-performance culture.
  • Avijit's appointment is part of Varroc's growth ambitions across India and key international markets.
  • He succeeds Kavita Kulkarni, who played a significant role in shaping Varroc’s people strategy and building a robust global talent pipeline.
  • Arjun Jain, CEO – Whole Time Director & CEO- Business I, Varroc, expressed his appreciation for Kavita's contributions and welcomed Avijit's leadership.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Varroc Engineering Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [SKIL] SKIL Infrastructure Ltd. Holds Fifth Committee of Creditors Meeting on April 08, 2026
item.description:
SKIL Infrastructure Limited has informed the Exchange about the Post Facto Intimation of the Fifth (5th) Committee of Creditors meeting held on Wednesday, April 08, 2026. The meeting was conducted through Audio-Visual means in virtual mode, starting at 11 A.M. and ending at 12:30 P.M. This update comes after the intimation submitted on April 07, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • SKIL Infrastructure held the Fifth Committee of Creditors meeting on April 08, 2026.
  • The meeting was conducted through Audio-Visual means in virtual mode.
  • The meeting commenced at 11 A.M. and concluded at 12:30 P.M.
  • This update follows the intimation submitted on April 07, 2026.
  • The meeting adhered to the Regulation 30 and Schedule III of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SKIL Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BAJAJST] Bajaj Steel Industries Ltd: No Awareness of Specific Reasons for Share Price Movement
item.description:
Bajaj Steel Industries Ltd has clarified that it is not aware of any specific reason for the recent movement in its share price. The company has been complying with Regulation 30 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has been regularly intimating the Exchange of all material events. The movement in the company's share price appears to be purely market-driven.

  • Bajaj Steel Industries Ltd is not aware of any specific reason for the recent movement in its share price
  • The company has been complying with Regulation 30 and other applicable provisions of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
  • Bajaj Steel Industries Ltd has been regularly intimating the Exchange of all material events

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ STEEL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [QUINTEGRA] Quintegra Solutions Ltd Reports Compliance with Corporate Governance Regulations for Q1 2026
item.description:
Quintegra Solutions Ltd, a leading company, has released its Integrated Corporate Governance filing for the quarter ended 31st March 2026. The report highlights the composition of the Board of Directors, meetings of the Board and Committees, and other affirmations as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Quintegra Solutions Ltd reports compliance with corporate governance regulations for Q1 2026.
  • The report includes the composition of the Board of Directors, meetings of the Board and Committees.
  • The company has affirmed that the composition and meetings of the Board and Committees are in line with the SEBI regulations.
  • The report has been placed before the Board of Directors for their comments, observations, or advice.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: QUINTEGRA SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Monthly Update
